content:
📊 **AI 科研日报** — 2026年05月23日 周六
> 🔥 Agent工具 + 🚀 推理加速 + 💻 本地部署

## 🔥 GitHub 开源项目精选
1. [SalhaNabil/CloakBrowser](https://github.com/SalhaNabil/CloakBrowser)
   CloakBrowser Github: anti-detect browser download, source-level chromium patches | ⭐331
2. [edgenuitybot/exodusbot](https://github.com/edgenuitybot/exodusbot)
   Exodus | The # 1 Edgenuity Bot for Quizes, Tests, and Exams. Includes Auto Answe | ⭐274
3. [CylinderChairman/aida64](https://github.com/CylinderChairman/aida64)
   aida64 unlocker extreme edition | ⭐243
4. [0xSero/codex-shim](https://github.com/0xSero/codex-shim)
   Local Responses-API shim that exposes Factory BYOK models (and optional ChatGPT  | ⭐235
5. [Jawaz-Keyzor/DarkGPT](https://github.com/Jawaz-Keyzor/DarkGPT)
   Unrestricted ChatGPT client with built-in jailbreak presets, web interface, and  | ⭐232
6. [orchestration-agent/AgentOrchestration](https://github.com/orchestration-agent/AgentOrchestration)
    | ⭐213
7. [MoonshotAI/kimi-code](https://github.com/MoonshotAI/kimi-code)
   The Starting Point for Next-Gen Agents | ⭐165
8. [zqbxdev/webchat2api](https://github.com/zqbxdev/webchat2api)
   OpenAI-compatible Web Chat API proxy with GPT/Grok account management | ⭐143

## 📈 今日趋势
- Agent + 工具调用持续火热
- 推理效率优化成为焦点
- 多模态模型进展迅速
- 本地部署需求增长
